writing.task1:
Dear Casting Coordinator
I write to connect with my sefl-tape upload link expired two hours before the stated deadline because sever reset in Sept 14 at 1:43pm. Please request a 12 hours extension for my self-tape or give me an alternate upload method. My file naming is "Hihi" with 70 world to slate and scene order meet the brief.
Thank you
writing.task2: I strongly agree for all productions that involve staged physical contact should require certified intimacy coordination and basic stunt-safety training for performers. Because when actor invole staged physical contact, they need director certified intimacy coordination and basic stunt-safety training for reduce acident. That help productions reduce the budget and time
writing.task3: A three  preparation strategies show we see strategies A: Private Coach is practice time shorter on week( 2x60min) but expensive($40/session) and more line retention and confidence. strategies B: Peer Rehearsal Circle is more practice time with 3x45min/week, and free cost, but less line retention and confidence( 11% and 12%). Last preparation strategies is solo work with apps have %6/week and lowest line rerention and confiednece but practice time longer(5x30min/week). Recommend a plan for someone with limited money but a strict opening date is strategies B: Peer Rehearsal Circle because free cost but effective.
